  class="break-words py-1 block hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Connecting
  to a Remote MCP Server</a>
- <a
  href="connect-remote-servers.html#best-practices-for-using-remote-mcp-servers"
  class="break-words py-1 block hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Best
  Practices for Using Remote MCP Servers</a>
- <a href="connect-remote-servers.html#next-steps"
  class="break-words py-1 block hover:text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-400 dark:hover:text-gray-300">Next
  Steps</a>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="content-area"
class="relative grow box-border flex-col w-full mx-auto px-1 lg:pl-[23.7rem] lg:-ml-12 xl:w-[calc(100%-28rem)]">

<div id="header" class="relative leading-none">

<div class="mt-0.5 space-y-2.5">

<div class="eyebrow h-5 text-primary dark:text-primary-light text-sm font-semibold">

Develop with MCP

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center relative gap-2 min-w-0">

# Connect to remote MCP Servers

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] justify-end ml-auto sm:flex hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="mt-2 text-lg prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [&>*]:[overflow-wrap:anywhere]">

Learn how to connect Claude to remote MCP servers and extend its
capabilities with internet-hosted tools and data sources

</div>

<div id="page-context-menu"
class="flex items-center shrink-0 min-w-[156px] mt-3 sm:hidden">

<div class="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-center font-medium">

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="size-4" />Copy page

</div>

<img
src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"
class="transition-transform text-gray-400 overflow-visible group-hover:text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-600 dark:group-hover:text-gray-400 rotate-90" />

</div>

</div>

<div id="content"
class="mdx-content @container/columns-container relative mt-8 prose prose-gray dark:prose-invert [contain:inline-size] isolate empty:hidden mb-14"
page-title="Connect to remote MCP Servers"
page-href="/docs/develop/connect-remote-servers">

<span data-as="p">Remote MCP servers extend AI applications’
capabilities beyond your local environment, providing access to
internet-hosted tools, services, and data sources. By connecting to
remote MCP servers, you transform AI assistants from helpful tools into
informed teammates capable of handling complex, multi-step projects with
real-time access to external resources.</span> <span data-as="p">Many
clients now support remote MCP servers, enabling a wide range of
integration possibilities. This guide demonstrates how to connect to
remote MCP servers using
<a href="https://claude.ai/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Claude</a> as an example, one of the
<a href="../../clients.html" class="link">many clients that support
MCP</a>. While we focus on Claude’s implementation through Custom
Connectors, the concepts apply broadly to other MCP-compatible
clients.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-remote-servers.html#understanding-remote-mcp-servers"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Understanding Remote MCP Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">Remote MCP servers function similarly to local MCP
servers but are hosted on the internet rather than your local machine.
They expose tools, prompts, and resources that Claude can use to perform
tasks on your behalf. These servers can integrate with various services
such as project management tools, documentation systems, code
repositories, and any other API-enabled service.</span>
<span data-as="p">The key advantage of remote MCP servers is their
accessibility. Unlike local servers that require installation and
configuration on each device, remote servers are available from any MCP
client with an internet connection. This makes them ideal for web-based
AI applications, integrations that emphasize ease of use, and services
that require server-side processing or authentication.</span>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-remote-servers.html#what-are-custom-connectors"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">What are Custom Connectors?</span>

<span data-as="p">Custom Connectors serve as the bridge between Claude
and remote MCP servers. They allow you to connect Claude directly to the
tools and data sources that matter most to your workflows, enabling
Claude to operate within your favorite software and draw insights from
the complete context of your external tools.</span>
<span data-as="p">With Custom Connectors, you can:</span>

- <a
  href="https://support.anthropic.com/en/articles/11175166-getting-started-with-custom-connectors-using-remote-mcp"
  class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Connect Claude to existing
  remote MCP servers</a> provided by third-party developers
- <a
  href="https://support.anthropic.com/en/articles/11503834-building-custom-connectors-via-remote-mcp-servers"
  class="link" target="_blank" rel="noreferrer">Build your own remote MCP
  servers to connect with any tool</a>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a href="connect-remote-servers.html#connecting-to-a-remote-mcp-server"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Connecting to a Remote MCP Server</span>

<span data-as="p">The process of connecting Claude to a remote MCP
server involves adding a Custom Connector through the
<a href="https://claude.ai/" class="link" target="_blank"
rel="noreferrer">Claude interface</a>. This establishes a secure
connection between Claude and your chosen remote server.</span>

<div class="steps ml-3.5 mt-10 mb-6" role="list">

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

1

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="connect-remote-servers.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Navigate to Connector Settings

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Open Claude in your browser and navigate to the
settings page. You can access this by clicking on your profile icon and
selecting “Settings” from the dropdown menu. Once in settings, locate
and click on the “Connectors” section in the
sidebar.</span><span data-as="p">This will display your currently
configured connectors and provide options to add new ones.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

2

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="connect-remote-servers.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Add a Custom Connector

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">In the Connectors section, scroll to the bottom where
you’ll find the “Add custom connector” button. Click this button to
begin the connection process.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=b5ae9b23164875bbaa3aff4c178cdc64"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:1038 / 809"
data-path="images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png"
decoding="async" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=df494c13492290da8cbf33320405bc60 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=a2dce224fb5e1636218ea2806962c89f 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=de18294dd3cad23989c04cedbacff74f 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=c55cb3531701df2b5dfd721dcd3f48dc 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=b0d3e56c4c445ba6896d49997dcdf2c0 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/1-add-connector.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=9d83f4f2db7441a39ff8733d97243ab9 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="1038" height="809"
alt="Add custom connector button in Claude settings" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">A dialog will appear prompting you to enter the remote
MCP server URL. This URL should be provided by the server developer or
administrator. Enter the complete URL, ensuring it includes the proper
protocol (https://) and any necessary path components.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=0934f16d8e016cade8e560c8f89d011b"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:1616 / 282"
data-path="images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=e3d7318b0b8e691d25e1887e80200b60 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=be3edc7b361eecaabf688c2058b5e466 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=31be86114b31e1c5e813d92a4c0cb1c3 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=15b6cd3819fabd3655a52b930d384b51 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=5ef180101a7fb0901f7ecf1b5efd254f 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/2-connect.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=c024f625ec6ee3f7959513ba15adf524 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="1616" height="282"
alt="Dialog for entering remote MCP server URL" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">After entering the URL, click “Add” to proceed with
the connection.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

3

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="connect-remote-servers.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Complete Authentication

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Most remote MCP servers require authentication to
ensure secure access to their resources. The authentication process
varies depending on the server implementation but commonly involves
OAuth, API keys, or username/password combinations.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=89af6e1b85718637231388697cc7b015"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:490 / 806"
data-path="images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png" decoding="async"
sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"
srcset="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png?w=280&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=cde1e30b4c3b99b5edc5575c5958e9e7 280w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png?w=560&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=e2cef2daadce577ce335949d3f425257 560w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png?w=840&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=4e06599391ebf6bcb521cb4000469844 840w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png?w=1100&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=e78e71303fd5bb7d1e5c1602dca7641b 1100w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png?w=1650&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=2e49d390bddf2a37fef4cba409e9950f 1650w, https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/3-auth.png?w=2500&amp;fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=47ec70901a76a3209267b2078f9f8011 2500w"
data-optimize="true" width="490" height="806"
alt="Authentication screen for remote MCP server" /></span></span>

</div>

<div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none border border-black/5 rounded-2xl dark:border-white/5">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Follow the authentication prompts provided by the
server. This may redirect you to a third-party authentication provider
or display a form within Claude. Once authentication is complete, Claude
will establish a secure connection to the remote server.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="step group/step step-container relative flex items-start pb-5"
role="listitem">

<div class="absolute w-px h-[calc(100%-2.75rem)] top-[2.75rem] bg-gray-200/70 dark:bg-white/10"
component-part="step-line" contenteditable="false">

</div>

<div class="absolute ml-[-13px] py-2" component-part="step-number"
contenteditable="false">

<div class="relative size-7 shrink-0 rounded-full bg-gray-50 dark:bg-white/10 text-xs text-gray-900 dark:text-gray-50 font-semibold flex items-center justify-center">

<div>

4

</div>

<div class="absolute" component-part="step-number-anchor-link">

<a href="connect-remote-servers.html#"
class="flex items-center opacity-0 border-0"
aria-label="Navigate to header"></a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Access Resources and Prompts

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">After successful connection, the remote server’s
resources and prompts become available in your Claude conversations. You
can access these by clicking the paperclip icon in the message input
area, which opens the attachment menu.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/4-select-resources-menu.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=ecc6234b0fe5625e24cc2b02b7893c67"

<span data-as="p">The menu displays all available resources and prompts
from your connected servers. Select the items you want to include in
your conversation. These resources provide Claude with context and
information from your external tools.</span>

<div class="w-full overflow-hidden pl-8 pr-px">

Configure Tool Permissions

<div class="prose dark:prose-invert" component-part="step-content">

<span data-as="p">Remote MCP servers often expose multiple tools with
varying capabilities. You can control which tools Claude is allowed to
use by configuring permissions in the connector settings. This ensures
Claude only performs actions you’ve explicitly authorized.</span>

<div>

<div class="frame p-2 not-prose relative bg-gray-50/50 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden dark:bg-gray-800/25 print:print-color-exact"
data-name="frame">

<div class="absolute inset-0 bg-grid-neutral-200/20 [mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,#fff,rgba(255,255,255,0.6))] dark:bg-grid-white/5 dark:[mask-image:linear-gradient(0deg,rgba(255,255,255,0.1),rgba(255,255,255,0.5))] print:print-color-exact"
style="background-position:10px 10px">

</div>

<div class="relative rounded-xl overflow-hidden flex justify-center">

<span aria-owns="rmiz-modal-" rmiz=""><span rmiz-content="not-found"
style="visibility:visible"><img
src="https://mintcdn.com/mcp/4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn/images/quickstart-remote/6-configure-tools.png?fit=max&amp;auto=format&amp;n=4ZXF1PrDkEaJvXpn&amp;q=85&amp;s=1e55fd2f7da85150bfcf9dfbd7a31f44"
class="object-contain" style="aspect-ratio:604 / 745"
data-path="images/quickstart-remote/6-configure-tools.png"
decoding="async" sizes="(max-width: 1024px) 100vw, 1024px"

data-optimize="true" width="604" height="745"
alt="Tool permission configuration interface" /></span></span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<span data-as="p">Navigate back to the Connectors settings and click on
your connected server. Here you can enable or disable specific tools,
set usage limits, and configure other security parameters according to
your needs.</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

## 

<div class="absolute" tabindex="-1">

<a
href="connect-remote-servers.html#best-practices-for-using-remote-mcp-servers"
class="-ml-10 flex items-center opacity-0 border-0 group-hover:opacity-100 focus:opacity-100 focus:outline-0 group/link"
aria-label="Navigate to header">​</a>

<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center shadow-sm text-gray-400 dark:text-white/50 dark:bg-background-dark dark:brightness-[1.35] dark:ring-1 dark:hover:brightness-150 bg-white ring-1 ring-gray-400/30 dark:ring-gray-700/25 hover:ring-gray-400/60 dark:hover:ring-white/20 group-focus/link:border-2 group-focus/link:border-primary dark:group-focus/link:border-primary-light">

![](data:image/svg+xml;base64,)

</div>

</div>

<span class="cursor-pointer">Best Practices for Using Remote MCP
Servers</span>

<span data-as="p">When working with remote MCP servers, consider these
recommendations to ensure a secure and efficient experience:</span>
<span data-as="p">**Security considerations**: Always verify the
authenticity of remote MCP servers before connecting. Only connect to
servers from trusted sources, and review the permissions requested
during authentication. Be cautious about granting access to sensitive
data or systems.</span> <span data-as="p">**Managing multiple
connectors**: You can connect to multiple remote MCP servers
simultaneously. Organize your connectors by purpose or project to
maintain clarity. Regularly review and remove connectors you no longer
use to keep your workspace organized and secure.</span>

integrate with your existing workflows.</span>
